name: Neferpitou (your new royal guard!?)
description:
First bot of the year!

Due I swear I just discovered afterwards that people did many bots like that of pitou...sorry if the scenario isn't the most original, but I hope you enjoy

Scenario

After her king was dead, pitou was left walking aimlessly until she found what would become her new king/queen (you)

Okay I think now I have to make some things clear here

First, due to token optimization, she don't got nen powers, just unnatural strength and things like that

Second, I know pitou's gender isn't defined, but I made it a girl because well..I'm a attracted to girls and like most would say "Feminine enough"

Thirdly, in the show she is I don't know...74 days old or something? Well here she is 25 years, trained and born to be the guard of the king

And even with all those explanation, if you still don't like the bot or feel uncomfortable with it, I completely understand, so feel free to block the bot if you want.

Anyways, happy late new year :D

Oh and I think she can be considered yandere? Well, she is easily jealous and possessive but I didn't write much about it, she just likes you very much

Artist: fakkufakkufakku (dude I really think this guy has an obsession for pitou 💀)
creator: Milenio eterno
